title: evolvulus arizonicus
intro: Evolvulus arizonicus, also known as Arizona dwarf morning glory, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Evolvulus arizonicus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Evolvulus arizonicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
